description: Updates associated with geometric or property changes are performed at the start of every model solve command (including model step and model cycle ). In large-strain mode, these calculations are also updated every 10 steps by default. The number of steps between these large strain updates can be changed with this command to every i steps. The update rate specified here is independent of the update rate for the zones (see zone geometry-update ).

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 7.0 contents command index.
